author: System Migration
context: Verifying if FL VST wrapper exposes real param names and readable value-strings for 3rd-party plugins.
observation: Real names and readable units are exposed. getParamCount reports 4240 but real params are at low indices.
result: Calibration and intents work for VSTs exactly like native plugins.
tested_values: FabFilter Pro-C 3 parameters swept and read.
known_pitfalls: Controller truncates names to 30 chars causing potential collisions. Indices might shift across VST updates.
next_recommended_action: Cache indices and re-validate getParamName on connect. Build specific VST intents.
